title: Containerization for Quantum Applications
description: Learn to containerize quantum applications using Docker, ensuring reproducible environments across development, testing, and production. Master multi-stage builds, dependency management, and orchestration for quantum workloads.
learningObjectives: Create optimized Docker images for quantum applications with proper dependency management
Implement multi-stage builds to minimize image size while maintaining functionality
Configure containers for quantum simulator and hardware access
Set up Docker Compose for local quantum development environments
Handle sensitive credentials securely in containerized quantum applications
Orchestrate quantum workloads using Kubernetes patterns
